description_vernacular: Jika anda tertarik dengan teks ini, silahkan menghubungi Lembaga Alkitab Indonesia. Email: info@alkitab.or.id

language.name: North Moluccan Malay
language.area: North Maluku, Halmahera, Sula, and Obi islands. Labuha neighborhood (Christian), and some other families with parents of different ethnic origins.
